coordinator: MEV Koleji Özel Basınköy Anadolu Lisesi

seo.description_en: Upcycling Patterns is an Erasmus+ KA210-SCH project focused on sustainability, environmental awareness, climate responsibility, and upcycling through international school collaboration.
seo.description_tr: Upcycling Patterns, uluslararasi okul is birligiyle surdurulebilirlik, cevre bilinci, iklim sorumlulugu ve ileri donusume odaklanan bir Erasmus+ KA210-SCH projesidir.
seo.imageAlt_en: Upcycling Patterns project visual with sustainability, upcycling and partner countries
seo.imageAlt_tr: Surdurulebilirlik, ileri donusum ve ortak ulkeleri gosteren Upcycling Patterns proje gorseli
